country.declarationGoalOther: Estimate & document prep — not official filing

auth.name: Name
auth.accountLocked: Account locked. Please try again later.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.recentActivity: Here's an overview of your tax documents and activities
dashboard.calculateTax: Calculate your taxes and estimate refunds
dashboard.askAI: Get AI-powered tax advice and insights
dashboard.billingUpgradeHint: One-time license + yearly updates — like classic tax software.

cloudWake.info: Cloud instance (Render Free): after ~15 min of inactivity the server sleeps. The first visit may take 1–2 minutes — please wait and reload if needed.
cloudWake.waking: TaxDoc is starting… The cloud instance is waking from inactivity. Please wait ~1 minute, then try again.

landing.headline: Your legal tax & finance optimizer
landing.subheadline: TaxDoc helps you spot possible savings — calculator, documents, and AI advisor.
landing.disclaimer: All figures are non-binding estimates and do not replace tax advice. Consult a Steuerberater for binding guidance.
landing.featureCalculatorDesc: Werbungskosten, Sonderausgaben, Kinderfreibetrag, advance payments — ranked hints.
landing.featureDocumentsDesc: Manage payslips and receipts — DE categories similar to WISO. German return export as the goal.
landing.otherCountriesNote: TaxDoc is built for Germany first. When needed, choose US, Canada, Austria, Switzerland, or others for estimates and document prep — not official filing.
landing.featureAIDesc: Informational help on German tax topics — not binding advice.
landing.featureSecurityDesc: Your data stays under your control.

legal.footerDisclaimer: TaxDoc provides estimates and educational content — not tax advice under StBerG.
legal.impressumPlaceholder: Legal notice (placeholder): Provider details per § 5 TMG to be added. Contact: support@taxdoc.app
legal.datenschutzIntro: Privacy notice (placeholder): We process personal data to provide TaxDoc under GDPR.
legal.datenschutzPoint1: Account, document, and settings data for app operation.
legal.datenschutzPoint2: AI requests may be sent to connected providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) with your consent.
legal.datenschutzPoint3: You have rights to access, deletion, and objection — contact support@taxdoc.app.
legal.datenschutzNote: Finalize full privacy policy with legal counsel before go-live.

documents.title: Documents
documents.uploadFirst: Upload your first document to get started
documents.name: Name
documents.recategorizeSuccess: All documents recategorized for your country settings
documents.duplicateDescriptionAfterUpload: Your file was uploaded and analyzed. It looks like the same document already exists. Do you want to keep both copies or remove the new upload?
documents.duplicateSimilarContent: Very similar document content detected ({percent}% match)

calculator.title: Tax Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Estimate your taxes based on your country and income
calculator.disclaimer: These results are estimates only and do not constitute legal or tax advice. Consult a qualified tax professional for your situation.
calculator.countryHint: Germany is the default. Switch only when needed — features are limited outside DE.
calculator.leaveGermanyWarning: You are leaving Germany mode. Joint filing, Grenzgänger, advance payments, and optimization hints are fully available for DE only. Other countries provide estimates and document prep.
calculator.stubNotice: Basic estimate for this country — not full tax rules. Consult a tax professional for binding advice.
calculator.caProvinceHint: Federal tax plus simplified provincial tax for ON, BC, or AB.
calculator.caDisclaimer: Canada estimate: federal + provincial — not a complete T1 filing.
calculator.taxWithheldHint: Optional — enter Lohnsteuer (DE) or federal withholding (US) to estimate refund or amount owed.
calculator.steuerklasseVI: Class VI — Second job / no allowance
calculator.steuerklasseIDesc: Standard single taxpayer with full Grundfreibetrag.
calculator.steuerklasseIIDesc: Single parent with additional Entlastungsbetrag allowance.
calculator.steuerklasseIIIDesc: Married, higher earner — uses Ehegattensplitting (income splitting).
calculator.steuerklasseIVDesc: Married with equal income — same annual assessment as Class I.
calculator.steuerklasseVDesc: Married, lower earner — higher withholding, same annual brackets as Class I.
calculator.steuerklasseVIDesc: Second employment — no Grundfreibetrag applied to this income.
calculator.einzelveranlagungHint: Each person is assessed separately — standard for single taxpayers.
calculator.zusammenveranlagungHint: Joint tax return as a married couple with Ehegattensplitting — combined taxable income is halved, tariff applied, tax doubled.
calculator.steuerklassenComboHint: Payroll class combinations: III/V (single earner), IV/IV (equal income), or IV with factor — annual tax uses Ehegattensplitting under joint filing.
calculator.spouseWerbungskostenHint: Spouse work-related expenses — e.g. employee flat rate €1,230.

deductions.werbungskostenDesc: Job-related expenses; Arbeitnehmer-Pauschbetrag €1,230 applies by default.
deductions.vorsorgeaufwendungenDesc: Health insurance, long-term care, and pension contributions.
deductions.sonderausgabenDesc: Donations, church contributions, and similar special expenses.
deductions.aussergewoehnlicheBelastungenDesc: Extraordinary burdens such as medical costs above reasonable threshold.
deductions.homeofficeDesc: Home office flat rate — up to €1,260 per year (max 210 days × €6).
deductions.entfernungspauschaleDesc: Distance allowance for commuting to work (€0.30/km one way, simplified).
deductions.kinderfreibetragDesc: Tax allowance per child — enable and select how many children you have.
deductions.kirchensteuerDesc: Adds 9% church tax on income tax (member of recognized church).
deductions.standardDeductionDesc: 2024 federal standard deduction based on filing status (recommended for most filers).
deductions.mortgageInterestDesc: Interest paid on qualified home mortgage (itemized).
deductions.medicalExpensesDesc: Only amount exceeding 7.5% of AGI is deductible (itemized).
deductions.stateLocalTaxDesc: State and local income or property taxes — capped at $10,000.
deductions.studentLoanInterestDesc: Interest on qualified student loans — up to $2,500.

calculator.optimizationSubtitle: Possible savings — not guaranteed. Educational only.
calculator.vorauszahlungenHint: Income tax advance payments Q1–Q4 for balance estimate.
calculator.crossBorderHint: Simplified estimate when working abroad with DE residence.
calculator.dbaNote: Double taxation note: Depending on the double taxation agreement (DTA), either the exemption method (foreign income tax-free in DE) or credit method (foreign tax credited against German tax) applies. This estimate uses a simplified credit.
calculator.rentalHint: Rental income — simplified AfA and expenses.
calculator.marginalRateHint: Marginal rate hint: next euro taxed at approx. {{rate}}% (estimate).

optimization.hintWerbungskostenDesc: Employee flat rate €1,230 — training, tools, travel.
optimization.hintKinderfreibetragDesc: Approx. €9,540 per child — compare with Kindergeld.
optimization.hintKindergeldDesc: Finanzamt applies Günstigerprüfung — no double benefit.
optimization.hintRiesterDesc: State-subsidized retirement — full calc coming soon.
optimization.hintGrenzgaengerDesc: Work abroad, live in DE — DTA and foreign tax credit.
optimization.hintForeignTaxCreditDesc: Paid foreign tax may be credited.
optimization.hintVermietungDesc: Rent taxable — AfA, interest, costs deductible.
optimization.hintZusammenveranlagungDesc: Married couples can file jointly (Ehegattensplitting) — often lower tax than separate Einzelveranlagung.
optimization.hintEhegattensplittingDesc: Combined taxable income is halved, income tax tariff applied, then tax is doubled — simplified estimate.

aiAssistant.title: AI Tax Assistant
aiAssistant.subtitle: Powered by GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, and Gemini
aiAssistant.welcome: Hello! I'm your AI tax assistant. I can help you with tax questions, document analysis, calculations, and more. How can I assist you today?
aiAssistant.notConfiguredTitle: AI assistant unavailable on this server
aiAssistant.notConfiguredMessage: Chat is disabled because no AI API key is configured. This is expected on Render until you add a key.
aiAssistant.notConfiguredRenderSteps: On Render: open your service (taxdoc-beta) → Environment → Add Secret → OPENAI_API_KEY = sk-… → Save and redeploy.
aiAssistant.notConfiguredHint: You can also set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY instead of OpenAI. After redeploy, refresh this page.
aiAssistant.notConfiguredUserMessage: Connect your own OpenAI, Claude, or Google AI account to use the assistant — no server admin setup required.
aiAssistant.notConfiguredAdminHint: Admins can also set server-wide API keys (OPENAI_API_KEY, etc.) as a fallback for all users.
aiAssistant.errorGeneric: Failed to get AI response. Please try again.
aiAssistant.errorUnauthorized: Please sign in to use the AI assistant.
aiAssistant.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account settings and preferences
settings.name: Name
settings.countryHint: Country controls tax categories and document analysis.
settings.taxCountryHint: Germany is recommended with the richest calculator and return prep. Other countries: estimate + documents only.
settings.languageHint: Changing language updates the app menu and dashboard immediately after saving.
settings.passwordHelp: Forgot your password? Use the reset link on the login page.
settings.taxProfileHint: Improves calculator estimates — not tax advice.

twoFactor.description: Protect your account with a 6-digit code from Google Authenticator, Authy, or Microsoft Authenticator.
twoFactor.scanQr: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app or enter the key manually.
twoFactor.disableHelp: Enter your password and a current authenticator code.
twoFactor.backupCodesWarning: Save these codes in a secure place. Each code can only be used once.
twoFactor.regenerateSuccess: New backup codes have been created
twoFactor.verifySubtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app or a backup code.

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.description: Describe the problem or your suggestion. The developer sees your report directly in the admin area.
feedback.messagePlaceholder: What happened? What did you expect?
feedback.sent: Thank you! Your feedback was sent.
feedback.errorReported: Error was reported to the developer.

adminReports.title: Tester reports
adminReports.subtitle: Feedback and errors from beta testers

taxForms.title: Tax Forms (WISO-like)
taxForms.subtitle: Complete tax calculation system — more comprehensive than WISO Steuer

billing.title: Billing & Subscription
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription and payment methods
billing.paypalDesc: Pay securely with your PayPal account
billing.applePayDesc: Pay with Apple Pay on supported devices
billing.bankAccountDesc: Direct debit from your bank account
billing.notConfiguredHint: Buy buttons work after setting STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_PRICE_* in Render. Standard: €39 license + €19/year updates. Advisor: €390 + €190/year.
billing.pricingSubtitle: One-time license for the software plus yearly updates — transparent and fair.
billing.licenseModelNote: The license unlocks TaxDoc permanently. Yearly updates bring new tax rules and features.
billing.marketComparisonBody: Classic desktop tax software (WISO, SteuerGo) often costs around €30–50/year as a subscription. Tax advisor software runs €200–500+. TaxDoc combines a one-time license with yearly updates — a modern alternative with AI and cloud documents.
billing.checkoutSuccess: Payment successful — your plan will be updated shortly.

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: Full tax calculator, all countries, unlimited documents and AI — for individuals.

advisor.name: Tax Advisor
advisor.description: For practices: multi-client management, export, and priority support.

features.updatesFull: Rule updates with active update subscription

pricingSurvey.title: Your opinion matters
pricingSurvey.description: The beta phase has ended. Help us find a fair price for TaxDoc.
pricingSurvey.question: How much would you pay for TaxDoc?
pricingSurvey.commentPlaceholder: What matters to you about pricing?

aiProviders.title: Connect AI Providers
aiProviders.subtitle: Link your own OpenAI, Claude, or Google AI (Gemini) account. Your keys are encrypted and stored per user.
aiProviders.settingsTabHint: Connect your personal AI accounts so the assistant uses your credentials instead of server-wide keys.
aiProviders.serverFallback: Server fallback available if you don't connect your own key
aiProviders.limitationsTitle: What you can and cannot connect
aiProviders.notebookLmLimitation: NotebookLM has no public third-party API — apps cannot connect to your NotebookLM sessions. Use Google AI (Gemini) here, or open NotebookLM directly:
aiProviders.oauthLimitation: ChatGPT and Claude consumer logins are not available as OAuth for third-party apps. Connect using an API key from each provider's developer console.
aiProviders.encryptionNote: Your key is encrypted at rest using AES-256 before storage.
aiProviders.openProviderSite: Open provider site to create a key
aiProviders.oauthVerified: Google account verified — add your Gemini API key to enable chat
aiProviders.oauthNotConfigured: Google OAuth is not configured on this server — use an API key from Google AI Studio instead.

openai.name: OpenAI (ChatGPT API)
openai.desc: Use GPT-4o and other models via your OpenAI developer account.
openai.connectIntro: OpenAI does not offer consumer ChatGPT login for third-party apps. Create an API key instead:
openai.steps: Sign in at platform.openai.com|Go to API keys and create a new secret key|Copy the key (starts with sk-) and paste it on the next step

anthropic.name: Anthropic (Claude API)
anthropic.desc: Use Claude 3.5 Sonnet and other models via your Anthropic account.
anthropic.connectIntro: Claude consumer login is not available as OAuth. Create an API key instead:
anthropic.steps: Sign in at console.anthropic.com|Open Settings → API keys|Create a key (starts with sk-ant-) and paste it on the next step

google.name: Google AI (Gemini)
google.desc: Use Gemini models via Google AI Studio — not NotebookLM sessions.
google.connectIntro: Get a Gemini API key from Google AI Studio (this is not NotebookLM):
google.steps: Open aistudio.google.com and sign in with Google|Click Get API key → Create API key|Copy the key and paste it on the next step

custom.title: Other provider
custom.desc: Store an API key for another compatible OpenAI-style provider.
custom.label: Provider name
